use_codes.desc: A METHOD OF TREATING MILD TO MODERATE ACUTE PAIN IN ADULTS BY ADMINISTERING 975-1000 MG OF ACETAMINOPHEN AND 292.5-300 MG OF IBUPROFEN IN A SINGLE ADMINISTRATION
